whitespace_topics.why_it_matters: Heads of payments and finance operations are being asked to modernise AP, AR, supplier payments and working capital without creating operational uncertainty.
whitespace_topics.activation_idea: Build a campaign platform around confidence in business payments: control, visibility, resilience and partner support.
whitespace_topics.proof: Mastercard can connect commercial payments, money movement, open finance, advisory, insights, fraud and AI capability areas.
whitespace_topics.risk: The narrative must remain concrete and proof-backed, not a soft brand layer detached from products.

whitespace_topics.why_it_matters: Embedded payment teams want less integration complexity and more credible ecosystem support.
whitespace_topics.activation_idea: Create a partner activation that positions Mastercard as the trusted orchestration layer for embedded payments at enterprise scale.
whitespace_topics.proof: The Mastercard capability map spans payments, money movement, open finance, data, identity and services.
whitespace_topics.risk: Stripe and Adyen can credibly claim developer and platform mindshare, so Mastercard needs sharper platform proof.

whitespace_topics.why_it_matters: Global finance leaders want reliability, predictability and insight across supplier, marketplace and merchant flows.
whitespace_topics.activation_idea: Develop thought leadership that connects money movement to working-capital confidence, supplier resilience and decision support.
whitespace_topics.proof: Mastercard can connect cross-border rails, commercial payments, data and advisory narratives.
whitespace_topics.risk: Needs careful substantiation so the story does not overpromise treasury transformation.

whitespace_topics.topic: Trust controls for agentic commerce workflows
whitespace_topics.why_it_matters: Enterprise buyers will need ways to approve, govern and audit payment actions initiated by software agents and automated workflows.
whitespace_topics.activation_idea: Shape an executive narrative and pilot agenda around trusted payment controls for agentic commerce.
whitespace_topics.proof: Mastercard can credibly connect identity, authorisation, tokenisation, fraud, commercial payments and advisory services.
whitespace_topics.risk: The opportunity is early; frame it as practical readiness rather than speculative futurism.

recommendations.title: Pressure-test Finance-ops confidence for payment leaders
recommendations.why: It currently has the strongest whitespace score in this run.
recommendations.action: Create a one-page buyer brief: problem, audience, evidence, competitor crowding and a proposed Mastercard angle.

recommendations.title: Strengthen proof for PayPal
recommendations.why: Proof Strength is the weakest visible metric for this brand in the current scoring set.
recommendations.action: Add named customers, quantified outcomes, partner announcements or analyst-grade evidence before making a client-facing claim.

recommendations.title: Keep the source list narrow for now
recommendations.why: A controlled source list makes the first version easier to trust, review and debug.
recommendations.action: Add 3 to 5 high-quality public URLs per brand before expanding automated discovery.

run_diagnostics.warning: No new B2B-relevant evidence was fetched. Check data/sources.json and set real public URLs to enabled: true.
